title: rubus latissimus
intro: Rubus latissimus, also known as the broad-leafed raspberry or western raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus latissimus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus latissimus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in jams and preserves due to its edible fruit.
